s1_controller: ScrapJobs (<insert legal name before publishing>, CNPJ <insert before publishing>) is the controller of personal data collected on this platform.
s1_items: Account data: name, e-mail, tax ID and phone number
Resume data: experience, education, skills, languages and professional summary
Search preferences: monitored sites and keyword filters
Usage data: AI analyses, job applications, PDF extractions
s2_title: 2. Legal Basis for Processing (Brazilian LGPD, Art. 7)
s2_intro: All personal data processing on ScrapJobs has explicit legal basis:
s2_items: Contract performance (Art. 7, V): account, resume, job matching, notifications and payment.
Legal obligation (Art. 7, II): retention of Pagar.me payment identifiers for 5 years (Brazilian tax law).
Legitimate interest (Art. 7, IX): collection of jobs from public websites for service operation.
s3_items: Provide and maintain the job monitoring service
Send notifications of jobs matching your profile
Perform compatibility analysis using artificial intelligence
Improve and personalize the user experience
s4_intro: We do not sell your data. We share only with sub-processors necessary for operation:
s5_content: In compliance with Art. 33 of the Brazilian LGPD, personal data is transferred to: United States (OpenAI, AWS SES, Resend, AWS S3, Railway) and France (PDFMonkey). By using ScrapJobs, you consent to these transfers necessary for service delivery.
s6_content: Your data is stored on secure servers with encryption in transit and at rest. We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.
s7_intro: In compliance with Brazilian LGPD (Law 13.709/2018), you have the right to:
s7_items: Request deletion of your data (visit /app/account > Security)
Revoke consent for data usage (equivalent to account deletion)
s7_contact: To exercise your rights, e-mail contato@scrapjobs.com.br. We respond within 15 days (LGPD Art. 19).
s8_content: We use essential cookies for authentication and user session management. We do not use tracking or third-party advertising cookies.
s9_intro: Data is retained according to the purpose of each category:

s9_rows.data: Name, e-mail, tax ID, phone, resume
s9_rows.retention: While account is active + 30 days after deletion

s9_rows.data: Monitored sites, notifications, applications, PDF extractions and generations
s9_rows.retention: While account is active + 30 days after deletion
1 day after last appearance on source site

s9_process: 30 days after account deletion: personally identifiable data is removed and the record is anonymized. After 5 years: the anonymized record is permanently removed.
s10_content: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes by e-mail or service notice. The last update date is always indicated at the top of this page.
s11_content: By using AI-powered features (job matching and compatibility analysis), resume and job data is sent to OpenAI (USA). OpenAI may retain these transmissions for up to 30 days in logs, according to their standard API usage policy. Using these features implies acceptance of this condition. You can use ScrapJobs without AI features — basic monitoring and notification remain available.
s12_contact_label: To exercise your rights or ask privacy-related questions:
